mapper.insert: MERGE INTO shift_request_settings ( employee_id, target_year, target_month, weekly_days, updated_at ) KEY(employee_id, target_year, target_month) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{targetYear}, #{targetMonth}, #{weeklyDays}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO shift_request_days ( employee_id, request_date, request_slot, target_year, target_month, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{requestDate}, #{requestSlot}, #{targetYear}, #{targetMonth}, #{updatedAt} )
